text: The roadway within a circular intersection on which traffic travels in a counterclockwise direction around a central island.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 106 — Circulatory roadway

The roadway within a circular intersection on which traffic travels in a counterclockwise direction around a central island.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
